observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with compression damage
Visual pattern suggesting teeth compressed together
Localized deviation from normal zipper appearance
mechanism_explanation: Excessive pressure compresses components beyond tolerance.
defect_region: along the zipper teeth or fabric
severity_visual_description: moderate teeth compressed together visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Reduce clamping force and add force limiting sensors.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the teeth compressed together would be absent and surface appears normal.
